steps.title: Spot the model's shortcut
steps.content: The passage shows observational data can't constrain the actual methane range, yet the model prescribes a single uniform value—this is a simplification.

steps.title: Determine what this simplification implies
steps.content:
Since methane controls precipitation and humidity, a uniform value cannot match real variation, so model-reality disagreements are to be expected.

The other three either reverse the problem, focus on internal inconsistencies, or speculate without evidence.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
